# Event studies

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Initialize packages with version control
if (!requireNamespace("renv", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("renv")
}

# Run manual renv commands if needed
# renv::activate() # Activate the project library
# renv::restore()  # Restore the environment if running for first time
# renv::snapshot()  # After adding/updating packages, snapshot the state


# Load required packages
required_packages <- c(
  "arrow", "here", "dplyr", "DIDmultiplegtDYN", "ggplot2"
)
install_if_missing <- function(packages) {
  new_packages <- packages[!sapply(packages, requireNamespace, quietly = TRUE)]
  if (length(new_packages) > 0) {
    install.packages(new_packages)
  }
  invisible(sapply(packages, library, character.only = TRUE))
}
install_if_missing(required_packages)

# Ggplot theme
theme_pref <- theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.title = element_text(
      face = "bold", size = 12,
      margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 10, unit = "pt")
    ),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    axis.text = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 8),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "gray95"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray95"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 10, l = 10, unit = "pt")
  )
mappings
```


```{r}
rad = 2000
dat_panel_site <- open_dataset(
  here::here("data", "processed", "dat_panel_site_mo")) %>%
  filter(radius == rad) %>% 
  collect()

# Binary
# Define a function for running binary did_multiplegt_dyn with common parameters
run_binary_did_model <- function(
    outcome,
    treatment_threshold,
    normalized,
    same_switchers) {
  model <- try(did_multiplegt_dyn(
    df = dat_panel_site,
    outcome = outcome,
    group = "site_id",
    time = "month_id",
    treatment = paste0("treated_spill_count_", treatment_threshold, "_mo"), # Updated treatment column pattern
    effects = 12,
    placebo = 3,
    cluster = "site_id",
    normalized = normalized, # consider changing
    trends_lin = FALSE, # consider changing
    same_switchers = same_switchers, # doesn't make sense with so many periods
    less_conservative_se = TRUE,
    graph_off = FALSE
    # drop_if_d_miss_before_first_switch = FALSE
  ), silent = TRUE)
  return(model)
}

# Create parameter grid
param_grid <- expand.grid(
  outcome = c("price_median", "log_price_median"),
  treatment_threshold = c("mean", "p50", "p75"),
  normalized = c(TRUE, FALSE),
  same_switchers = c(TRUE, FALSE),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Calculate total number of models
total_models <- nrow(param_grid)

# Generate model names and create models
binary_did_results <- list()

# Wrap the entire loop in try to ensure the code continues even if there are errors
try({
  cat("Starting model estimation - total models:", total_models, "\n")
  
  for (i in 1:nrow(param_grid)) {
    # Extract parameters
    outcome <- param_grid$outcome[i]
    treatment_threshold <- param_grid$treatment_threshold[i]
    normalized <- param_grid$normalized[i]
    same_switchers <- param_grid$same_switchers[i]
    
    # Build model name
    model_name <- "model_binary"
    if (outcome == "log_price_median") model_name <- paste0(model_name, "_log")
    model_name <- paste0(model_name, "_", treatment_threshold)
    if (same_switchers) model_name <- paste0(model_name, "_sw")
    if (normalized) model_name <- paste0(model_name, "_norm")
    
    # Create a descriptive model label
    outcome_label <- ifelse(outcome == "price_median", "Price Median", "Log Price Median")
    threshold_label <- paste0(toupper(substr(treatment_threshold, 1, 1)), substr(treatment_threshold, 2, nchar(treatment_threshold)), " Threshold")
    norm_label <- ifelse(normalized, "Normalized", "Not Normalized")
    switchers_label <- ifelse(same_switchers, "Same Switchers", "All Switchers")
    
    model_description <- paste0(
      outcome_label, " ~ ", threshold_label, " Spill Count; ",
      norm_label, ", ", switchers_label
    )
    
    # Display progress information with description
    cat(sprintf("\n[%d/%d] (%d%%)\n", 
                i, total_models, round(i/total_models*100)))
    cat(sprintf("Running model: %s\n", model_name))
    cat(sprintf("Description: %s\n", model_description))
    
    # Run model and assign to environment
    model <- run_binary_did_model(outcome, treatment_threshold, normalized, same_switchers)
    assign(model_name, model)
    
    # Add to results list - even if it's an error
    binary_did_results[[model_name]] <- model
    
    # Also store the description with the model
    attr(binary_did_results[[model_name]], "description") <- model_description
    
    # Save intermediate results after each model (in case of later failure)
    try(saveRDS(binary_did_results,
      file = here("book", "book_regs", "binary_did_results_partial.rds")
    ), silent = TRUE)
    
    # Print estimated progress
    cat(sprintf("Progress: %d of %d models completed (%d%%)\n", 
                i, total_models, round(i/total_models*100)))
  }
})

# Save the final results
try(saveRDS(binary_did_results,
  file = here("book", "book_regs", "binary_did_results.rds")
))

cat("All models attempted - check results for any errors\n")

# To access descriptions later:
# binary_did_results$model_binary_p50_norm$description  # example

plots_binary <- Map(function(x, name) {
  x$plot +
    labs(subtitle = name)
}, binary_did_results, names(binary_did_results))

binary_did_results$model_binary_mean_sw_norm$plot
```



```{r}
# Continuous treatment
# Define a function for running did_multiplegt_dyn with common parameters
# Continuous treatment
# Define a function for running did_multiplegt_dyn with common parameters
run_did_model <- function(
    outcome,
    treatment,
    normalized,
    same_switchers) {
  # Enhanced try with silent option to prevent stopping
  model <- try(did_multiplegt_dyn(
    df = dat_panel_site,
    outcome = outcome,
    group = "site_id",
    time = "month_id",
    treatment = treatment,
    effects = 12,
    placebo = 3,
    cluster = "site_id",
    normalized = normalized, # consider changing
    trends_lin = FALSE, # consider changing
    # continuous = 2,
    same_switchers = same_switchers,
    less_conservative_se = TRUE,
    graph_off = FALSE,
    effects_equal = TRUE
  ), silent = TRUE)
  return(model)
}

# Create parameter grid
param_grid <- expand.grid(
  outcome = c("price_median", "log_price_median"),
  treatment = c("spill_count", "log_spill_count"),
  normalized = c(TRUE, FALSE),
  same_switchers = c(TRUE, FALSE),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Calculate total number of models
total_models <- nrow(param_grid)

# Generate model names and create models
cont_did_results <- list()

# Wrap the entire loop in a try to ensure the code continues even if there are errors
try({
  cat("Starting continuous model estimation - total models:", total_models, "\n")
  
  for (i in 1:nrow(param_grid)) {
    # Extract parameters
    outcome <- param_grid$outcome[i]
    treatment <- param_grid$treatment[i]
    normalized <- param_grid$normalized[i]
    same_switchers <- param_grid$same_switchers[i]
    
    # Build model name
    model_name <- "model_cont_mean"
    if (outcome == "log_price_median") model_name <- paste0(model_name, "_log")
    if (treatment == "log_spill_count") model_name <- paste0(model_name, "_logtreat")
    if (same_switchers) model_name <- paste0(model_name, "_sw")
    if (normalized) model_name <- paste0(model_name, "_norm")
    
    # Create a descriptive model label
    outcome_label <- ifelse(outcome == "price_median", "Price Median", "Log Price Median")
    treatment_label <- ifelse(treatment == "spill_count", "Spill Count", "Log Spill Count")
    norm_label <- ifelse(normalized, "Normalized", "Not Normalized")
    switchers_label <- ifelse(same_switchers, "Same Switchers", "All Switchers")
    
    model_description <- paste0(
      outcome_label, " ~ ", treatment_label, " (Continuous); ",
      norm_label, ", ", switchers_label
    )
    
    # Display progress information with description
    cat(sprintf("\n[%d/%d] (%d%%)\n", 
                i, total_models, round(i/total_models*100)))
    cat(sprintf("Running model: %s\n", model_name))
    cat(sprintf("Description: %s\n", model_description))
    
    # Run model and assign to environment
    model <- run_did_model(outcome, treatment, normalized, same_switchers)
    assign(model_name, model)
    
    # Add to results list - even if it's an error
    cont_did_results[[model_name]] <- model
    
    # Also store the description with the model
    attr(cont_did_results[[model_name]], "description") <- model_description
    
    # Save intermediate results after each model (in case of later failure)
    try(saveRDS(cont_did_results,
      file = here("book", "book_regs", "cont_did_results_partial.rds")
    ), silent = TRUE)
    
    # Print estimated progress
    cat(sprintf("Progress: %d of %d models completed (%d%%)\n", 
                i, total_models, round(i/total_models*100)))
  }
})

# Save the final results
try(saveRDS(cont_did_results,
  file = here("book", "book_regs", "cont_did_results.rds")
))

cat("All continuous models attempted - check results for any errors\n")

# To access descriptions later:
# cont_did_results$model_cont_mean_logtreat_sw_norm$description  # example

plots_cont <- Map(function(x, name) {
  x$plot +
    labs(subtitle = name)
}, cont_did_results, names(cont_did_results))
```
